raw_response:
Le composant `<Sidebar>` est défini dans `apps/web/components/Sidebar.tsx` (ligne 26) et est importé/utilisé dans **15 pages** :

| Fichier |
|---|
| `apps/web/app/audit/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/billing/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/dashboard/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/forgot-password/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/invite/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/login/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/members/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/notifications/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/pricing/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/profile/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/reports/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/sessions/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/settings/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/signup/page.tsx` |
| `apps/web/app/webhooks/page.tsx` |

Chaque page utilise `<Sidebar id="side" />` à deux endroits (lignes 50 et 59), vraisemblablement pour un rendu conditionnel (desktop/mobile ou deux breakpoints).
